subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! When the rapture of My call taketh hold of thee, say: My God, my God! Thou beholdest one of Thy handmaidens turning toward the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی اذا اخذک جذب ندائی قولی الهی الهی تری امه من امائک مقبله الی افق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
